title: Fissistigma kinabaluense
taxonomy: Fissistigma kinabaluense is a species within the plant family Annonaceae. This family comprises approximately 160 genera and 2,000 species of flowering plants. Annonaceae is part of the larger order Magnoliales, which is a group of flowering plants that also includes families such as Lauraceae and Hernandiaceae. The order Magnoliales is itself a part of the larger clade of flowering plants known as the angiosperms. The classification of Fissistigma kinabaluense reflects its evolutionary relationships with other flowering plants.
